title: The concept of investment appraisal
summary: 9609 A Level — why appraise projects and types of capital investment.

simpleExplanation.title: Should we invest?
simpleExplanation.summary: Investment appraisal compares costs and benefits of projects to decide if they meet required returns and strategic fit.

sections.content: **Investment appraisal concept** (10.3.1) opens **10.3**. Link to **6.2 strategy** and **5.2 finance**.
